zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Reade於1230年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其時，他的父親Robert Reade19歲，母親Cecilia Randall15歲。他和Lady Thomas Redydale至少有6個兒子。他去世於大約1300年在英國享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Reade was born in 1230, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert Reade, was 19 and his mother, Cecilia Randall, was 15. He had at least 6 sons with Lady Thomas Redydale. He died about 1300, in England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Reade est né en 1230, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Reade, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Randall, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Lady Thomas Redydale. Il est décédé environ 1300, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Readeが1230年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた時，父Robert Readeは19歳，母Cecilia Randallは15歳であった。彼はLady Thomas Redydaleとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1300年にイギリスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Reade(이)가 1230년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Reade(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Randall(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Lady Thomas Redydale(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Reade родился в 1230 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Reade было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Randall, 15. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Lady Thomas Redydale. Он умер около 1300 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 71 год.
